**Which layer does this affect?**
[ ] Layer 0 — Identity (identity package)
[ ] Layer 1 — Registry (registry package)
[ ] Layer 2 — Gateway (gateway package)
[ ] Layer 3 — HAI (hai package)
[ ] Layer 4 — MEK (mek package)
[ ] DHT (dht package)
[ ] Other

**What problem does it solve?**
Describe the problem or gap this feature addresses.

**Proposed solution**
Describe how you'd like this to work.

**Alternatives considered**
Any alternative approaches you've considered.
